name: stompers-redesign
description: Swamp City Stompers - Immersive band website

scripts.deploy: npm run build && tar --exclude='.git' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.claude' --exclude='*.md' --exclude='index.html' --exclude='*.jsonl' --exclude='footer-demos.html' --exclude='footer-final.html' --exclude='scroll-analysis-output' -czf /tmp/stompers-deploy.tar.gz . && scp /tmp/stompers-deploy.tar.gz whc-hellopebble:/tmp/ && ssh whc-hellopebble "cd /home/debl4277/public_html && tar -xzf /tmp/stompers-deploy.tar.gz && rm /tmp/stompers-deploy.tar.gz && echo DEPLOY OK"

author: Swamp City Stompers
